hero.title: Make your <accent>business</accent> work for you
hero.subtitle: We automate the tasks that waste your time so you can sell more and grow faster.

benefits.title: Let automations do the repetitive work
benefits.subtitle: We build, monitor and optimize your n8n flows so your team ships faster, makes fewer mistakes and has a real-time view of results.

saveTime.title: Save time
saveTime.body: Free yourself from repetitive tasks and focus on what truly moves your business.

fewerErrors.title: Scale without hiring
fewerErrors.body: Automate processes without increasing your team.

visibility.title: Serve 24/7
visibility.body: Never lose a customer for replying late.

connectStack.title: Reduce errors
connectStack.body: Faster, more accurate processes without human dependencies.

security.title: Focus on growth
security.body: Spend your hours on strategy, sales and important decisions.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From discovery to dashboard, we collaborate with your team to deliver reliable automations and visible impact.

discovery.title: 1 · Diagnosis
discovery.body: We detect the tasks that take the most time from you.

design.title: 2 · Design
design.body: We create automated flows tailored to your business.

build.title: 3 · Integration
build.body: We connect your tools so everything works without friction.

monitor.title: 4 · Automation
monitor.body: Prozeso starts working for you, day and night.

iterate.title: 5 · Optimization
iterate.body: We keep working so each day you worry less and earn more.

scale.title: 6. Ongoing support
scale.body: We don’t leave you alone. We monitor your automations, spot improvements and keep them up to date.

howItWorks.ctaPrompt: Ready to identify your highest-ROI automations?

finalCta.title: Let Prozeso work for you
finalCta.subtitle: Start automating your business today and get back the time you need to grow.

list.title: Automation catalog
list.subtitle: Explore ready-to-use flows. We tailor each automation to your stack and set up monitoring and alerts.

hero.title: Let’s see together how your business could keep running while you keep serving customers
hero.subtitle: Try a live demo to discover how Prozeso will help you day to day.

tailoredFlow.title: Tailored flow
tailoredFlow.desc: We’ll show you in minutes how to automate the tasks that currently steal your time.

builtInComms.title: Built-in communications
builtInComms.desc: You’ll see how your business can attend, schedule and respond without depending on anyone.

paymentsTrust.title: Payments and trust
paymentsTrust.desc: You’ll leave with a clear view of how to gain time, professionalism and peace of mind from day one.

hero.title: Take the first step toward a business that never stops
hero.subtitle: We listen, understand your day to day and create a system that works for you, even when you can’t.

intro.title: Tell us your story
intro.desc: Every business has its rhythm. We want to understand yours: how you work, what holds you back and what you’d like to change.

call.title: We design your system
call.desc: We automate the tasks that waste your time—calls, appointments, messages—so your day revolves around what truly matters again.

launch.title: Start to breathe
launch.desc: While you keep serving your customers, the system takes care of the rest. No stress, no interruptions, no lost revenue.

assessment.cardSubtitle: No commitment. Just a conversation to discover how your business can gain time, order and peace of mind.

goals.label: What are you looking for?
goals.placeholder: Briefly tell us what you’d like to achieve...

assessment.disclaimer: We work with real businesses that need time to enjoy what they do again, without stopping growth.

success.title: Thanks! We’ve received your request.
success.body: Our team will contact you shortly to schedule your free call.

assessment.serverErrorDefault: Something went wrong. Please try again.

problem.title: The problem
problem.lead: Every minute you spend doing repetitive tasks is a minute you’re not spending growing your company.
paragraphs: Answering calls. Organizing appointments. Sending emails. Updating spreadsheets.
All those small tasks that keep you busy… are also the ones that keep you from moving forward.
Your time is worth more. And so is your business.
problem.subtitle: Manual, fragile operations slow your team and hide what’s really happening.

time.title: Too much manual work
time.body: Repetitive tasks consume hours each week and delay what matters.

fragile.title: Fragile glue between tools
fragile.body: Spreadsheets, zaps and ad‑hoc scripts break silently and are hard to audit.

errors.title: Errors and rework
errors.body: Data mismatches and skipped steps create incidents and costly rework.

cost.title: Rising costs as you scale
cost.body: More volume implies more manual work: operations don’t scale with the business.

solution.title: The solution
solution.lead: Turn manual processes into automated systems that run 24/7.
bullets: Your customers get an immediate response without you picking up the phone.
Appointments schedule themselves while you sleep.
Leads are captured and qualified automatically without anyone touching a CRM.
solution.outro: We analyze how you work, automate what holds you back, and let Prozeso do the heavy lifting for you.

connect.title: Connect your tools
connect.body: Integrate CRM, email, sheets, ads, billing and internal APIs with n8n.

standard.title: Standardize processes
standard.body: Clear triggers, validation, retries and alerts to keep flows predictable.

secure.title: Secure by design
secure.body: Encrypted secrets, RBAC and audit logs in every flow.

optimize.title: Monitor and improve
optimize.body: Live dashboards and iteration to increase performance and reliability.

impact.title: The impact
impact.subtitle: Visible results that compound over time.
paragraphs: It’s getting back productive working hours, reducing operating costs and freeing the team to focus on what truly matters: serving better, selling more and growing without limits.

reservations.title: More confirmed bookings
reservations.body: Up to 40% more confirmed bookings thanks to instant responses.

hours.title: Hours recovered
hours.body: More than 10 hours per employee recovered each week.

support.title: 24/7 service
support.body: Round‑the‑clock service without hiring more staff.

costs.title: Lower operating costs
costs.body: Operational costs reduced by up to 30%.
